column2: Opheusden, Holland, October 6th, 1944. As the 506th moved into positions along the front, the British pulled out with their tanks. The Germans launched a full scale attack eastwards into and around Opheusden using the 363rd Volksgrenadier Division supported by armor and artillery.
The German player wins if they have more units in buildings of board 3 than the Americans have units in buildings of board 1.
Set up on any hex on board 3 and on board 1 East of row E. Turn 5: Enter along any East edge hex. Command Points: 1 until turn 5, then 3 for the remainder of the game.
Set up on any hex on board 1 West of row E. Turn 3: Enter along any West edge hex.
